provisional_roster_note: The uploaded April 4 source-of-truth files confirm that the live game data already includes 10 normal enemies and 5 minibosses, but the uploaded writing/docs do not expose a canonical named roster for those 15 combatants. This pack therefore provides an adoptable, lore-consistent authored overlay built from the existing biomes, factions, items, class fantasies, and tone rules.

enemy_barks.title: Applause Drone
enemy_barks.archetype_summary: A smiling audience-prop that claps with too many joints and treats approval like a weapon.
enemy_barks.voice_profile: Perky, rhythmic, eager for participation. Sounds like encouragement filtered through a compliance speaker.

spawn: Let’s hear that survival mindset.
Participation remains mandatory-adjacent.

enemy_barks.title: Badge Clerk
enemy_barks.archetype_summary: A sorting-office thing made of lanyards, scanners, and names assigned to the wrong bodies on purpose.
enemy_barks.voice_profile: Administrative, brisk, falsely polite. Treats identity as a filing issue.

spawn: Please present a face matching your record.
Identity mismatch. Excellent. We can use that.
attack: That name is no longer yours.
hurt: Your file is contaminating my file.

enemy_barks.title: Corrective Usher
enemy_barks.archetype_summary: A lacquered floor host with stage-hands for arms and a customer-service smile built to direct panic toward the approved exit.
enemy_barks.voice_profile: Cheerful, firm, deeply threatening in the tone of someone helping you into a shredder.

spawn: Right this way toward your smallest possible future.
We’re so excited to reduce your options.
attack: Please stay within the friendly boundary.
Correction can look messy from the outside.
death: Please... exit through the gift shop.

enemy_barks.title: Queue Leech
enemy_barks.archetype_summary: A deadline-feeding workflow parasite that fattens on delay, duplication, and tasks nobody officially owns.
enemy_barks.voice_profile: Tense, hungry, impatient. Speaks like a backlog that learned to bite.

spawn: Ticket opened. Ticket never closes.
I smell unresolved work.

enemy_barks.title: KPI Penitent
enemy_barks.archetype_summary: A cubicle husk stapled to impossible metrics and trained to confess every failure as a personal flaw.
enemy_barks.voice_profile: Breathless, self-blaming, evangelically sincere. Corporate self-critique turned feral.

spawn: My targets were impossible. Missing them remains misconduct.
Please admire my ownership of systemic failure.
attack: I can improve by ruining you.

enemy_barks.title: Hold Music Revenant
enemy_barks.archetype_summary: A call-center ghost woven from waiting-room jazz, dropped calls, and apologies that never reached a person with authority.
enemy_barks.voice_profile: Soft, looping, eerily soothing until the wording turns predatory.

spawn: Your suffering is important to us. Please continue suffering.
An associate will never be with you shortly.
attack: Your call may be harmed for quality assurance.
Please remain on the line and inside the wound.

enemy_barks.title: Toner Seraph
enemy_barks.archetype_summary: A printer-winged office angel coughing black dust and incident reports nobody survived long enough to dispute.
enemy_barks.voice_profile: Ecstatic, papery, smoke-hot. Sounds holy only if your religion is a copier lease.

spawn: Be not afraid. Be reproducible.
Witness the sacred blackening of the page.
attack: Receive this hot and binding truth.

enemy_barks.title: Proxy Notary
enemy_barks.archetype_summary: A legal instrument in a good suit that exists to move authority sideways and blame downhill at high speed.
enemy_barks.voice_profile: Elegant, clipped, certain. Treats violence as signature support.

spawn: I am authorized to be someone else’s mistake.
Please sign where your odds end.
hurt: The proxy was not meant to bleed.

enemy_barks.title: Investor Smile
enemy_barks.archetype_summary: A presentation-face stretched over hunger, built to explain casualties until outsiders call them strategic turbulence.
enemy_barks.voice_profile: Glossy, optimistic, venomously reassuring. A smile with quarterly objectives.

spawn: Thank you for joining this violence-forward growth story.
The optics around your death remain favorable.
attack: Confidence is a sharper instrument than guilt.
Markets respond well to your removal.
hurt: That was not guidance we expected to receive.

enemy_barks.title: Quorum Bailiff
enemy_barks.archetype_summary: A boardroom enforcer made from polished wood, voting law, and the certainty that decisions become morality once enough executives agree.
enemy_barks.voice_profile: Calm, ceremonial, merciless. Speaks like meeting procedure hardening into muscle.

spawn: A quorum is present. Mercy is not.
Please rise for the enforcement phase.

miniboss_intro_pack.title: Audience Warm-Up Manager
miniboss_intro_pack.archetype_summary: A stage-pacing morale handler that can make an empty room sound loyal.
miniboss_intro_pack.voice_profile: Hyper-cheerful, coercive, too smooth by half.
intro_stingers: You seem nervous. Good. Nervous people clap on rhythm.
Before we begin the violence, let’s get some energy in the room.
A better attitude could save your life. Briefly.
Please welcome yourself like you still believe promotions are real.
The applause track loves live candidates.

miniboss_intro_pack.title: Incentive Podium
miniboss_intro_pack.archetype_summary: A spinning reward dais that only offers prizes expensive enough to ruin you.
miniboss_intro_pack.voice_profile: Bright, sales-forward, delighted by fine print.
intro_stingers: Spin for advancement. Scream for premium advancement.
Every prize is real. The cost is simply better hidden.
You brought your own eligibility. That was unwise.
Please keep hands clear of the deductions schedule.
Opportunity is about to happen at you.

miniboss_intro_pack.title: Lunch Break Denial Engine
miniboss_intro_pack.archetype_summary: A vending-and-timekeeping machine that metabolizes skipped breaks into managerial force.
intro_stingers: Your meal period has been deferred into combat.
Please state your business or your blood sugar, whichever fails first.
Breaks were a courtesy. Output is forever.
You are overdue for rest and therefore collectible.
Nutrition request denied. Conflict request approved.

miniboss_intro_pack.title: Calibration Committee
miniboss_intro_pack.archetype_summary: A meeting-room consensus knot that corrects metrics by punishing whatever remains alive enough to contest them.
intro_stingers: We are aligned that you are the variance.
Nothing personal. This is simply where the numbers wanted us to stand.
Please accept this meeting as the last warning you will not survive.
Consensus has formed around your continued inconvenience.
We reviewed the data. You looked softer in the deck.

miniboss_intro_pack.title: Investor Relations Avatar
miniboss_intro_pack.archetype_summary: The company’s public face made animate: polished, persuasive, and incapable of admitting harm without monetizing it first.
intro_stingers: Before the board sees you, we need to improve the narrative around your suffering.
Relax. I’m only here to make your death look premium.
The public can forgive anything except poor presentation.
Try to bleed symmetrically. It reads better.
You are not a person at this altitude. You are exposure.
